# hetzner_rdns (Resource)

Manages a reverse DNS (PTR) record for an IP address.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "hetzner_rdns" "example" {
  ip  = "203.0.113.1"
  ptr = "server.example.com"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `ip` (String) IP address for the rDNS entry. Used as the unique identifier.
- `ptr` (String) PTR record value (hostname).
